file_insights.changes: Converted from stub endpoints to fully functional SEO API with 4 endpoints
key_additions: PUT /{content_id} endpoint for metadata updates (upsert pattern)
POST /{content_id}/keywords endpoint for AI-powered keyword suggestions
Helper function _to_response for model-to-response conversion with JSON deserialization

file_insights.changes: New service file with complete SEO business logic
key_additions: Portuguese readability score calculation algorithm (0-100 scale)
Portuguese stop words/simple words set (67 words)
SEOService class with 4 methods: get_metadata, upsert_metadata, analyze, suggest_keywords
AI integration for keyword suggestion with Portuguese-specific prompt engineering

algorithm_details.complex_word: 4+ syllables AND not in simple words list

patterns_discovered.implementation: SessionDep and AIServiceDep injected into endpoints, service receives dependencies in constructor
patterns_discovered.benefit: Loose coupling, testability, clear dependency graph

patterns_discovered.implementation: AsyncSession with sqlmodel for async queries, proper commit/refresh cycle
upsert_metadata checks existence, creates or updates, handles None fields as optional
patterns_discovered.benefit: Idempotent operations, no duplicate key errors

patterns_discovered.implementation: Regex-based sentence/word splitting, syllable counting, language-specific stop words
patterns_discovered.scope: Limited to Portuguese readability, not full NLP

patterns_discovered.implementation: HTTPException for 404/400 errors, ValueError for business logic validation
keywords list stored as JSON string in database, deserialized in _to_response

gotchas_discovered.issue: keywords field stored as JSON string in database but returned as list in response
gotchas_discovered.risk: Easy to forget deserialization, could cause type errors

gotchas_discovered.issue: Syllable estimation is crude (vowel group counting), not linguistically accurate
gotchas_discovered.note: Works for readability purposes but may misclassify complex words

gotchas_discovered.issue: Fixed set of 67 words, not comprehensive for all domains (religious content)
gotchas_discovered.risk: May incorrectly classify domain-specific terms as 'simple'
gotchas_discovered.note: Set labeled _PORTUGUESE_SIMPLE_WORDS suggests more complete than actual

gotchas_discovered.issue: suggest_keywords checks 'if not self.ai_service.available_models' could raise AttributeError
gotchas_discovered.risk: Should validate ai_service is not None first

gotchas_discovered.issue: AI prompt uses content.body[:2000] for keyword suggestion
gotchas_discovered.risk: Longer articles truncated, may miss important keywords in later sections

gotchas_discovered.issue: analyze() endpoint always recalculates, no caching
gotchas_discovered.performance: For large texts, repeated calls could be expensive

gotchas_discovered.issue: meta_title/meta_description lengths not validated (common SEO issues: title >70 chars)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Can save invalid SEO data without warnings

approach_outcome.completion: All 4 endpoints fully implemented with business logic
core_deliverables: SEOService class with readability calculation algorithm
4 functional API endpoints with proper error handling

recommendations.recommendation: Implement caching for readability scores (cache key: content_id + body_hash)
recommendations.rationale: analyze endpoint may be called repeatedly without content changes

recommendations.recommendation: Add SEO field validation: meta_title length 30-70 chars, description 100-160 chars
recommendations.rationale: Common SEO best practices being ignored

recommendations.recommendation: Expand Portuguese stop words list or use nltk/spacy for better tokenization
recommendations.rationale: Current approach is functional but may misclassify domain-specific terms

recommendations.recommendation: Add null checks before accessing ai_service.available_models
recommendations.rationale: Potential AttributeError if ai_service is None but check doesn't verify

recommendations.recommendation: Document readability score algorithm with example calculations and thresholds
recommendations.rationale: Algorithm uses magic numbers (1.5, 2.0, 4 syllables) without explanation

recommendations.recommendation: Consider batch keyword suggestion endpoint for bulk content (POST /keywords with content_ids)
recommendations.rationale: Current single-item endpoint requires multiple calls for bulk operations

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for readability_score() with known Portuguese test cases
recommendations.rationale: Algorithm complexity warrants dedicated test coverage
